description_long: This is a stylish, deep navy blue hat with a wide, gently curved brim and a tall, cylindrical crown. The hat features a dark purple band encircling the base of the crown, secured with a round, black decorative buckle on one side. A striking arrangement of long, natural feathers in shades of white, brown, and black is attached to the band, fanning upward and outward for dramatic flair. The brim is broad and slightly asymmetrical, providing both shade and a sense of elegance. The overall construction suggests a felt or wool material, giving the hat a soft yet structured appearance. This accessory is reminiscent of classic cavalier or musketeer styles, often seen in period or theatrical urban settings.
description: A navy blue wide-brimmed hat with a tall crown, purple band, black buckle, and dramatic feather arrangement.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full oval brim, tall crown, and the feather cluster prominently on one side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length and upward sweep of the feathers, as well as the hat's sloped brim.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back curve of the brim and the feathers extending outward from the band.
description_view_3: Angled view displaying the hat's crown, band, buckle, and the full spread of the decorative feathers.
